info.title: ENS Delegation Incentives API
info.description: API for the ENS delegation incentives system — active voters, eligibility, reward estimates, APY, tiers, rounds, and distribution history.

get.description: Returns voters who meet the voting activity threshold, sorted by voting power descending.

last10ProposalsVoted.description: Per-proposal voting record for the last 10 finalized proposals (most recent first)

activeSince.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the voter's earliest vote

get.description: Checks whether an address is eligible for incentives by verifying it delegates (directly, via multi-delegate, or via Hedgey vesting) to an active voter.
Estimates voter and token-holder rewards for the current month based on current VP, delegation state, and tier.

get.summary: Estimate APR and rewards for an address
get.description: Returns role, delegation info, estimated monthly reward, APR, and lottery qualification for the given address.
Returns current round dates, progress, pool size, and active tier index. Dates are UTC.

startDate.description: ISO 8601 UTC start of the round

endDate.description: ISO 8601 UTC end of the round

poolSizeEns.description: Current round tier pool size in ENS

vpGrowthPct.description: Current month active VP growth percentage

get.summary: List configured rounds with reward summaries
get.description: Returns all configured ROUND_MONTHS rounds with UTC dates, global pool/distribution metadata when available, and truthful missing-data states.

eligibleTokenHolderCount.description: Computed round count of direct payout rows with a positive token-holder reward. Excludes sub-1 ENS lottery entries and lottery-only winners.

lotteryBucketCount.description: Number of deterministic lottery buckets formed from sub-1 ENS entries.

lotteryEntryCount.description: Number of sub-threshold reward entries participating in the lottery.

lotteryParticipantCount.description: Unique address count across lottery entries.

get.description: Returns one round's global reward summary, optional address-specific reward, and top delegate/token-holder rewards when distribution data exists.

schema.description: Optional Ethereum address for wallet-specific round earnings

parameters.description: Optional Ethereum address for wallet-specific round earnings
parameters.name: address

schema.description: Reward ranking rows to return on round detail. Defaults to 10. Use all to return every reward row.

parameters.description: Reward ranking rows to return on round detail. Defaults to 10. Use all to return every reward row.
parameters.name: rewardLimit

eligibleTokenHolderCount.description: Computed round count of direct payout rows with a positive token-holder reward. Excludes sub-1 ENS lottery entries and lottery-only winners.

lotteryBucketCount.description: Number of deterministic lottery buckets formed from sub-1 ENS entries.

lotteryEntryCount.description: Number of sub-threshold reward entries participating in the lottery.

lotteryParticipantCount.description: Unique address count across lottery entries.

probability.description: Entry win probability inside the bucket, formatted as a 0-1 decimal string.

get.description: Returns top delegate and token-holder rewards for one round when stored distribution data exists.

schema.description: Optional Ethereum address for wallet-specific round earnings

parameters.description: Optional Ethereum address for wallet-specific round earnings
parameters.name: address

schema.description: Reward ranking rows to return on round detail. Defaults to 10. Use all to return every reward row.

parameters.description: Reward ranking rows to return on round detail. Defaults to 10. Use all to return every reward row.
parameters.name: rewardLimit

eligibleTokenHolderCount.description: Computed round count of direct payout rows with a positive token-holder reward. Excludes sub-1 ENS lottery entries and lottery-only winners.

lotteryBucketCount.description: Number of deterministic lottery buckets formed from sub-1 ENS entries.

lotteryEntryCount.description: Number of sub-threshold reward entries participating in the lottery.

lotteryParticipantCount.description: Unique address count across lottery entries.

probability.description: Entry win probability inside the bucket, formatted as a 0-1 decimal string.

get.summary: Tier progression and current VP growth
get.description: Returns all tier definitions with current unlock state, VP thresholds, estimated APR, and overall VP growth.

currentTotalVP.description: Current total VP held by active voters (wei)

maxTokenHolderAprPct.description: Highest estimated token-holder APR across all tiers

additionalVPNeeded.description: Wei needed above current VP to reach this tier

requiredTotalVP.description: VP threshold to enter this tier (wei)

estimatedAprPct.description: Estimated token-holder APR at this tier (calibrated against round-start VP)

get.summary: List distribution months or address history
get.description: Without query parameters, returns an array of YYYY-MM month strings for computed distributions. With ?address=0x..., returns that address's per-round distribution history derived from stored results.

schema.description: Optional Ethereum address for address-specific distribution history

parameters.description: Optional Ethereum address for address-specific distribution history
parameters.name: address

200.description: Distribution month list or address distribution history

get.description: Returns the curated distribution result for the requested month.
Returns the distribution for the requested month as a downloadable CSV file.
Returns active voter count, total indexed proposals, and available distribution months.

totalDelegatedEns.description: Total ENS held by active voters (sum of latest VP snapshots), formatted as ENS string

holdersEarning.description: Current count of active voters plus unique direct token holders of active voters with a positive ENS balance. This is live delegation state, not finalized round payout recipients.
